Acoustic Target Curve Visualizer

Reference curve for project SQ-Comp-Ref. Drag in your own curve, or grab a standard curve from the Nono Tuning Tool (nonotuningtool.com) — it plots offline once dropped in. Part of the Autosound Tuning Skill project — an AI-guided car-audio tuning workflow that reads what each curve means for your instruments.

Frequency (Hz)
↳ Drop a curve .txt file here (REW/NTT: freq dB) — or click to choose one. Plots instantly, offline.
click a card below to hide/show that curve  ·  right-click the chart for a frequency-character guide
SQ-Comp-Ref (Tight-Sub Edition)
Our own curve, developed in-house for this project. Blends deep-but-controlled bass with SQ accuracy: a deep sub-bass floor (+9.0 dB, similar to Audiofrog), a soft, ultra-smooth roll-off to 200 Hz (fully removes boominess), a presence dip (-2 dB at 2.5 kHz) and a natural HF roll-off (-0.5 dB/oct).
Flat
0 dB reference line — the neutral baseline. Useful for reading other curves' absolute deviation at a glance.
💡 Tip
